---
name: lattix-refactor
description: Refactor code safely without behavior drift
argument-hint: "<file/module/refactor goal>"
agent: agent
---
<!-- BEGIN LATTIX GENERATED AGENT STANDARDS
Source: LATTIX-IO/lattix-monorepo:.github/prompts/lattix-refactor.prompt.md
Bundle: 2026.05.05
Do not edit this file directly. Update the canonical source in lattix-monorepo and run scripts/sync-agent-standards.ps1.
END LATTIX GENERATED AGENT STANDARDS -->
Refactor the selected code safely.

Rules:
- Preserve behavior unless explicitly changed.
- Start by identifying current behavior and tests.
- Add characterization tests if coverage is weak.
- Produce the smallest safe diff.
- Improve names, boundaries, duplication, and error handling.
- Keep domain logic pure and IO isolated.
- Do not add new dependencies unless justified.
- Do not weaken tests or bypass linters/types.

Return:
Refactor plan; behavior-preservation tests; changes; verification commands; risks.
